inputs.name: active
inputs.description: Defines if the busy indicator is visible on the screen. By default it is not.

inputs.name: delay
inputs.description: Defines the delay in milliseconds, after which the busy indicator will be visible on the screen.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Defines the size of the component.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Defines text to be displayed below the component. It can be used to inform the user of the current operation.

inputs.name: textPlacement
inputs.description: Defines the placement of the text.
